title: Device Home Screen - End-of-Life Support After End Life Date
scenario: Device Home Screen shows red "i" icon and "Support for this device is no longer available" pop-up when connected Poly device has passed its End of Life date
steps: 2. Ensure a Poly device that has passed its End of Life (EOL) date is connected.
4. Locate the red "i" icon in the top right corner of the screen.
6. Observe the pop-up message that appears.
7. Tap outside the pop-up to dismiss it.
expected: A pop-up message is displayed: "Support for this device is no longer available." Tapping outside the pop-up dismisses it.
